signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Up from 2.0%, Below Consensus of 2.3-2.4%) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven by oil prices but tempered by government measures like fuel caps, with monthly inflation at 0.3-0.34% and core at 2.2%.[1][2][3][4]
